title: HealthBar+
description: A utility mod that adds health bar above player.
body:
# HealthBar+

## Introduction
> **Adds a custom-designed health bar drew with text renderer & vertex.**

## Features
- Toggle all features via keybind
- Color changing depending on player's current health
- Custom-designed health bar

## Why?
> Server like craftm.kr, they displays player's health by their scoreboard & nametag.   
> Original health indicator doesn't work well, but when you use this mod, you can see much better interface for other player's health via custom-designed health bar.

## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (Optional)

## Updates & Screenshots
- [Changelog](https://modrinth.com/mod/healthbar+/changelog)
- [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/healthbar+/gallery)

## Credits
> *Developed & Maintained solely by [kop](https://modrinth.com/user/kop)*
